---
title: "BMBL Analysis Notebooks"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.home-band}
::: {.home-band-main}
![](https://cpb-us-w2.wpmucdn.com/u.osu.edu/dist/0/72768/files/2020/07/bmbl_logo1-300x124.png){.home-logo}

<span class="home-kicker">Internal protocol atlas</span>

# BMBL Analysis Notebooks

This site turns the repository into a browsable static reference for BMBL bioinformatics workflows. It is built for readers who already know the assays and analysis ecosystem and need a quicker way to orient themselves to workflow usage, code patterns, committed figures, and source materials.

It is not a from-scratch training course. Each page stays at the usage-and-rationale level and points back to the committed repository source rather than re-running notebooks.
:::

::: {.home-band-side}
### Start here

[RNA-seq Workflow](rnaseq-workflow.qmd)

Use the RNA-seq pilot page as the clearest example of the current in-site workflow format: prerequisites, structured steps, committed images, and links back to the source materials.

### Use this site for

- Browse workflows by assay category using the catalog and left-hand navigation
- Review workflow pages as Tier B usage-and-rationale references
- Follow GitHub source links when you need the original workflow folders, notebooks, or companion files
- Use [How to Add a Workflow](CONTRIBUTING_to_site.md) when extending the site
:::
:::

## Workflow catalog

Browse by assay family. The catalog is intentionally dense and optimized for scanning.

{{< include /_generated/workflow-catalog.qmd >}}
